reasoning: The SOC2 control A1.1 focuses on capacity planning to ensure adequate system capacity. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that the cluster can scale appropriately and that workloads have defined resource requests and limits to manage capacity effectively. The Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler and Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) are directly related to capacity management. Additionally, setting resource requests and limits on pods ensures that workloads are scheduled based on available capacity. Monitoring node resource utilization helps in proactive capacity planning.
title: A1.1 Capacity Management: The entity conducts capacity planning to ensure adequate system capacity
